title: abelmoschus manihot var. timorensis
intro: Abelmoschus manihot var. timorensis, also known as Timorese okra, is a variant of the okra plant, a flowering plant in the mallow family. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, wounds, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Abelmoschus manihot var. timorensis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional medicine in some parts of the world.
